CreateSslVpnServer.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/VPC/s/gjwvyu77i/).
CreateSslVpnServer.sslVpnServerName: SSL-VPN server instance name; alphanumeric and -_/. special characters, must start with a letter, length 1-65
CreateSslVpnServer.interfaceType: SSL-VPN server interface type. Valid values: [tap, tun], default is "tap"
